title: Assertion `flags3==pIn3->flags' failed.
poc: CREATE VIEW f(g, h) AS SELECT b, 0 FROM a UNION SELECT d, 0 FROM c;
SELECT lead(g = g) OVER() FROM f GROUP BY h);
CREATE VIEW f(g, h) AS SELECT b, 0 FROM a UNION SELECT d, d FROM c;
SELECT g = g FROM f GROUP BY h;
key_bug_features: SELECT lead(g = g) OVER() FROM f GROUP BY h
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a(b TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE VIEW f(g, h) AS SELECT b, 0 FROM a UNION SELECT CAST(d AS TEXT), d FROM c;
